bitcoin_security_reviews.value_proposition: Get your Bitcoin setup reviewed by an expert and eliminate costly mistakes
pain_points_addressed: Fear of losing Bitcoin to mistakes

city_programs.value_proposition: Bring structured Bitcoin education to your community

membership_program.value_proposition: Accelerate your path to financial independence with expert guidance

Desire for community of like-minded people

variations.text: Want an expert to review your Bitcoin setup? Get peace of mind with a Personal Security Review.
Don't risk losing your Bitcoin to a simple mistake. Get your setup professionally reviewed.
Every month, people lose Bitcoin to preventable mistakes. Don't be one of them.
Get new Bitcoin education delivered monthly, plus access to our private community.
Join 500+ members learning Bitcoin together. Ask questions, share wins, stay updated.
Ready to take your financial planning to the next level? Learn how Bitcoin fits into a sovereign financial strategy.
Bring Bitcoin education to your team. Custom workshops designed for your industry.
Bring trusted Bitcoin education to your community. Programs designed for cities and libraries.

problem_section.headline: Are You Making These Dangerous Bitcoin Mistakes?
problems: Using exchange custody for large amounts
Mixing hot and cold storage incorrectly

solution_section.headline: What You Get in Your Security Review
deliverables: 30-minute video call to review your current setup
Personalized security checklist with specific improvements
Written assessment report you can reference later
30 days of follow-up email support for questions

rules: Every article gets at least one relevant CTA
CTAs match content topic (Bitcoin content → Bitcoin services)
Mid-article CTAs are soft, end-article CTAs can be stronger
Maximum 2 CTAs per article to avoid CTA fatigue

placement_logic.mid_article: After 40% of content, before any technical sections
placement_logic.exit_intent: Pop-up when user shows leaving behavior

security_review_nurture.trigger: Downloaded custody guide or visited security content 3+ times

sequence.subject: Your Bitcoin security checklist
sequence.content: Thanks for downloading the guide. Here's what most people miss...

sequence.content: Real story of a Bitcoin holder who lost funds due to poor backup practices

sequence.subject: Last chance: Security review spots filling up
sequence.content: Only booking 10 reviews this month. Don't wait.

sequence.subject: Your next step in Bitcoin education

sequence.subject: What our members are saying
sequence.content: Social proof and testimonials from current members

high_intent_visitors.audience: Visited pricing pages, spent 5+ minutes on service pages

content_readers.audience: Read 3+ articles, spent 10+ minutes on site
content_readers.offer: Free resource related to their interests

metrics_to_track: Page views to each service landing page
CTA click-through rates by placement and type
Email sequence open and click rates
Customer lifetime value by acquisition source

optimization_schedule.weekly: Review CTA performance and adjust underperformers

social_media.twitter: Drive to free resources → email sequences
